title: 3D Mace
description: Adds A 3D Mace In Your game !!
body:
# ⚔Important!
**Do not pay attention that the resource pack is marked as old, this is normal, it performs its task!!**

**Optifine is not needed.**

# 🗿Description

**Some players didn't like the texture of the mace.So, I make a 3D mace Texture pack For you all.Enjoy !!**

# PREVIEW:-
